steps.title: Name Your Ideal Customer
steps.description: What is the name of this ideal customer?

steps.title: Company & ICP Details
steps.description: Provide details about your company and the ICP. What is special about them?

elements.label: Tell us about this ICP
elements.value: Our ideal customers are developers and startup founders who want to save time and avoid reinventing the wheel when building SaaS applications.

elements.label: What are the names of your offers for this ICP? Separate by commas.
How does your company help this ICP?
elements.value: ShipFast provides a robust boilerplate for developers to launch SaaS products quickly and efficiently.

steps.title: ICP Details & Summary
steps.description: Fill in the details about your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP). You can also use AI to help generate these details as a starting point. The more insightful your answers, the more effective your AI optimization strategies will be.

elements.label: Who they are
elements.value: Developers and startup founders building SaaS products.

elements.label: What they want
elements.placeholder: What are their goals, needs, or desired outcomes?
elements.value: To launch SaaS applications quickly with minimal setup and proven best practices.

elements.label: What gets in the way
elements.placeholder: What obstacles or challenges do they face?
elements.value: Time constraints, lack of boilerplate code, and uncertainty about scalable architecture.

elements.label: How your solution helps
elements.placeholder: How does your product or service address their needs?
elements.value: ShipFast provides a ready-to-use SaaS boilerplate, reducing development time and ensuring scalability.

elements.label: Unique selling points
elements.placeholder: What makes your solution stand out?
elements.value: Comprehensive features, modern tech stack, easy customization, and rapid deployment.

elements.label: Alternatives
elements.placeholder: What other solutions might they consider?
elements.value: Building from scratch, using open-source templates, or other SaaS boilerplates.

elements.label: Decision criteria
elements.placeholder: What factors influence their buying decision?
elements.value: Speed of setup, feature completeness, documentation quality, and community support.

elements.label: Search triggers
elements.placeholder: What events or needs prompt them to look for a solution?
elements.value: Starting a new SaaS project, tight deadlines, or lack of internal resources.

elements.label: Information channels
elements.placeholder: Where do they go for information or advice?
elements.value: Developer forums, GitHub, tech blogs, and social media communities.

elements.label: Competitors
elements.value: Other SaaS boilerplate providers, open-source projects, and freelance developers.

elements.label: Why choose you
elements.placeholder: Why would they select your solution over others?
elements.value: ShipFast offers a faster launch, better documentation, and more features out of the box.

elements.label: Hesitations
elements.placeholder: What concerns or doubts might they have?
elements.value: Concerns about customization limits, ongoing support, and long-term scalability.
